labels.name: check_inventory
labels.description: Check if a product and size combination is in stock

labels.name: place_order
labels.description: Place an order for a t-shirt. Creates a Stripe checkout session and returns a payment URL for the buyer to complete purchase.

labels.name: track_order
labels.description: Get the status of an existing order by order ID

findings.title: Description uses pressure/override language
findings.detail: Description of "search_products" stacks urgency/override words (always, never). Legitimate tool descriptions rarely pressure the model to act or ignore prior guidance.

evidence.snippet: Search the The Others t-shirt catalog by keyword, tag, or max price. Returns product names, descriptions, prices, sizes, colors, and official product image URLs…

findings.title: Description uses pressure/override language
findings.detail: Description of "get_product" stacks urgency/override words (always, never). Legitimate tool descriptions rarely pressure the model to act or ignore prior guidance.

evidence.snippet: Get full details of a specific t-shirt product by ID, including official product image URLs. Always use this tool to show product images — never use web search …
